result.stderr:
InternalAccessibleCompiler 1.0.0
mob-sakai
USAGE:
Compile your project to internal accessible dll:
InternalAccessibleCompiler --output your.dll your.csproj

  -o, --output            (Default: ) Output path. If it is empty, a dll is 
                          generated in the same path as csproj.

  -a, --assemblyNames     Target assembly names separated by semicolons to 
                          access internally

  -c, --configuration     (Default: Release) Configuration

  -l, --logfile           (Default: compile.log) Logfile path

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

  ProjectPath (pos. 1)    Input .csproj path
